settings.money_back_text: Not satisfied? Return your item within 30 days for a full refund — no questions asked. Items must be unused with original packaging. Email hello@yourstore.com to start a return.

settings.question: Does it feel high quality in real life?
settings.answer: Yes — we obsess over materials. Every bag is crafted in smooth vegan leather with solid metal hardware. Customers regularly tell us it feels far more premium than the price suggests.

settings.question: Will it fit my everyday essentials?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Our bags are designed to comfortably hold your phone, wallet, keys, sunglasses, and small makeup pouch — with room to spare.

settings.question: Is this a real and safe place to order from?
settings.answer: Yes — we are a registered European business. Every order ships worldwide, is covered by our 30-day money-back guarantee, and is handled by a small human team based in our home studio.

settings.question: What if the color looks different in real life?
settings.answer: Colors are photographed in natural light and can vary slightly by monitor. If the color isn't what you expected, return within 30 days for a full refund.

settings.question: Why is the price this level?
settings.answer: We sell direct — no middlemen, no department-store markup. You get designer-level quality at a fraction of the cost.

settings.question: What if I change my mind after ordering?
settings.answer: No stress. You have 30 days from delivery to return for a full refund. Reach out to hello@yourstore.com and we'll handle it.
